macro_context.market_sentiment: DOT at ~$1.30, deeply depressed. Polkadot has suffered one of the worst relative performances of major L1s. Narrative challenges: complex architecture, slow adoption, JAM upgrade uncertainty.
macro_context.btc_dominance: ~57-59% BTC dominance. High dominance crushes Layer-1 alts like DOT.
macro_context.total_market_cap: Total crypto ~$2.60T. DOT market cap ~$2B at current prices — fallen from top-10 to ~top-20.
macro_context.fear_greed_index: 29/100 = Fear. DOT particularly vulnerable as it needs risk appetite to recover.
macro_context.fed_outlook: Higher-for-longer rates hurt interoperability plays like DOT where ecosystem value depends on DeFi growth.
macro_context.institutional_flows: Minimal institutional flow specifically into DOT. Some DOT ETF applications exist but low conviction. Web3 Foundation grants continue funding ecosystem.
macro_context.regulatory: DOT viewed as commodity in most frameworks. Polkadot JAM (Join-Accumulate Machine) upgrade attracting developer attention.

ticker_news.headline: DOT hits all-time lows vs BTC — Polkadot ecosystem facing existential questions
JAM upgrade (Polkadot's next-gen architecture) testnet live
Web3 Foundation deploys $50M in ecosystem grants for JAM development
Polkadot OpenGov passes 'Plaza' proposal to simplify parachain UX
DOT staking at 56% of supply — very low float reduces volatility potential
Polkadot parachain auctions replaced by coretime sales — new revenue model

on_chain_signals.whale_activity: DOT whale wallets mixed. Some bottom-fishing at historic lows. Large staked positions mean illiquid supply, but unstaking takes 28 days — creates selling waves when unlocks happen.
on_chain_signals.funding_rates: DOT perpetual funding negative (-0.03%). Short crowding. Potential squeeze but needs catalyst.
on_chain_signals.exchange_flows: DOT exchange reserves relatively stable. Staking mechanics keep most supply locked. Limited short-term trading dynamics.

development_activity: Polkadot development active on JAM architecture (major upgrade), Polkadot SDK (formerly Substrate), WASM virtual machine optimizations. Parachain ecosystem stable with Acala, Moonbeam, Astar active. However developer mindshare lost to Solana/ETH L2s.
upcoming_catalysts: JAM upgrade mainnet deployment. Polkadot Plaza simplification. DOT ETF potential. CLARITY Act. Recovery of developer interest if JAM delivers on promise. Very deep value play at current prices if Polkadot narrative recovers.
